items.title: Nets' Chaney Johnson: Signs two-way deal with Brooklyn
items.author: CBS Sports
items.body_excerpt: Nets' Chaney Johnson: Signs two-way deal with Brooklyn CBS Sports

items.title: Brooklyn Nets forward Chaney Johnson is signing his two-way qualifying offer and will return next season, league sources told HoopsHype. Johnson averaged 8.2 points on 54.3% shooting from the field with 4.6 rebounds in 20.5 minutes during 17 games played for Brooklyn last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Brooklyn Nets forward Chaney Johnson is signing his two-way qualifying offer and will return next season, league sources told HoopsHype. Johnson averaged 8.2 points on 54.3% shooting from the field with 4.6 rebounds in 20.5 minutes during 17 games played for Brooklyn last season.

items.title: The Brooklyn Nets have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Chaney Johnson, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Brooklyn Nets have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Chaney Johnson, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Johnson will now be a restricted free agent this summer.

items.title: Tyler Bilodeau is the second power forward the Brooklyn Nets are coming out of this draft with after they selected Joshua Jefferson in the first round. Bilodeau shoots way better than the other young power forwards on the roster, and could slot into Chaney Johnson's two-way spot.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: Tyler Bilodeau is the second power forward the Brooklyn Nets are coming out of this draft with after they selected Joshua Jefferson in the first round. Bilodeau shoots way better than the other young power forwards on the roster, and could slot into Chaney Johnson's two-way spot.
